pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties to target JDK 21.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling for JDK 21 or may fail to recognize JDK 21 language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from source/target to release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures API compatibility with the target JDK, replacing the deprecated source/target approach.
